question: Platinum MCard
answer:
The Platinum M Card gives you a 5-10% discount on regular-priced items at The Mall Group department stores, Power Mall, and Gourmet Market branches.
No minimum purchase is needed, and this includes online shopping.
You earn 1 M Point for every 25 Baht spent at these stores and online.
You can redeem 800 M Points for a 100 Baht shopping voucher with an extra 12.5% discount.
This is valid at The Emporium, The EmQuartier, Siam Paragon, and partner stores nationwide.
Special services include advance parking reservation via the M Card app and in-store product delivery.
You also get a personal shopping assistant and can shop hands-free without carrying bags.
Priority online delivery and free delivery with no minimum purchase are available too.
Plus, you have access to the exclusive Platinum M Lounge.
There’s also the MLUXE Chat & Shop service for online shopping with expert advice from The Emporium and The EmQuartier.
For more details, you can contact Line: @EMDISTRICT.
Enjoy these great perks with your Platinum M Card!

question: Platinum M Card
answer:
The Platinum M Card gives you a 5–10% discount on regular-priced items at The Mall Group department stores, Power Mall, and Gourmet Market branches.
You earn 1 M Point for every 25 Baht spent at these stores and online.
Redeem 800 points for a 100 Baht voucher plus an extra 12.5% discount when redeeming points.
Enjoy special privileges at Emporium, Emquartier, Siam Paragon, and global partner stores.
You get special parking privileges and can reserve parking in advance via the M Card app.
There’s a delivery service for in-store purchases and priority delivery for online shopping.
You can shop with a personal assistant and even shop hands-free without carrying bags.
Free delivery is available with no minimum purchase, subject to store conditions.
Access the exclusive Platinum M Lounge.
Plus, use the MLUXE Chat & Shop service for personalized online shopping advice from experts.
For more details, you can contact Line: @EMDISTRICT.
It’s a great card for convenience, savings, and exclusive services!

question: first time one
answer:

you get a free 100 Baht e-Coupon when you top up 500 Baht at Bangkok Bank branches in The Mall, Emporium, EmQuartier, EmSphere, and Paragon.
The e-Coupon can be used in all departments, Gourmet Market, and Power Mall at these locations.
You can redeem the e-Coupon at the Inspector point or customer service point after one business day.
Also, if you apply for a new M Card via the M Card Application,
you receive a Welcome Coupon worth 100 Baht for shopping in the first month of application.
Plus, you get 1 hour of free parking at The Mall Lifestore, The Mall branches, Emporium, EmQuartier, and EmSphere (except Paragon).
This offer is valid from November 1, 2025, to March 31, 2026.

- สูงสุด 50,000 บาท รับเงินคืน 1,300 บาท
